findings: VRAM stayed 0 MB for entire 4 minute monitoring window
OS kernel driver reclaims and zeros VRAM on hard kill
critical_finding: SIGKILL is safer than graceful exit. OS driver zeros VRAM immediately on hard kill. Graceful exit leaves 457 MB. SIGKILL leaves 0 MB.
conclusion: SIGKILL forces immediate VRAM reclaim and zeroing. No data left for next tenant.
